data.title: AVAX jumps 4.5% to $34.02, facing resistance with RSI above 72, indicating overbought levels for Avalanche.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently valued at $34.02, representing a daily increase of 4.52%. However, caution is advised as technical analysis shows that the Relative Strength Index (RSI) has surpassed 72, indicating overbought conditions and potential resistance in the near future.

data.title: Advantest to showcase latest test solutions at International Test Conference 2025 in San Diego from Sep 21-26, featuring IC test technologies for AI, HPC, 5G, and automotive. #semiconductors #testing
data.description: In Tokyo on Sept. 19, 2025, Advantest Corporation, a prominent semiconductor test equipment provider listed as TSE: 6857, announced their participation in the 2025 International Test Conference happening from Sept. 21-26 at the Hilton San Diego Bayfront in San Diego, California. At the conference, Advantest will showcase its advanced IC test solutions. The displayed technologies will cover various applications such as AI, high-performance computing (HPC), 5G, and automotive sectors. Moreover, Advantest will hold the prestigious title of a Platinum sponsor for the event, emphasizing its commitment to the industry.

data.title: Polkadot's price rises by 2.85%, reaching $4.59 after community sets token supply cap at 2.1B, shifting to scarcity-driven tokenomics.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently at $4.59, showing a positive trend after the community gave their approval for the supply cap referendum. This signifies a significant change in the tokenomics, shifting from inflationary practices to scarcity-driven strategies.

data.title: EQT AB's Nomination Committee for 2026 Shareholders' Meeting announced with Jacob Wallenberg as Chairperson.
data.description: The Nomination Committee for EQT AB's Annual Shareholders' Meeting 2026 in Stockholm was recently formed on September 19, 2025. The committee was selected according to the ownership distribution as of August 31, 2025. Headed by Chairperson Jacob Wallenberg, who was nominated by Investor AB Cynthia, this committee will play a key role in the upcoming shareholders' meeting.

data.title: MATIC price below $0.40, trading at $0.38 (-0.29% in 24h) with RSI at 38, indicating possible oversold state. Weakness persists near 52-week lows.
data.description: The cryptocurrency MATIC is currently trading at $0.38, showing a decrease of 0.29% in the last 24 hours. Its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 38, indicating potential oversold conditions. Despite nearing its 52-week lowest point, technical indicators suggest a likelihood of further weakness in the near future.

data.title: BCP S.A. calls outstanding 500M EUR Senior Preferred Fixed to Floating Rate Notes due in Oct 2026.
data.description: BCP S.A. has announced its decision to redeem the existing EUR500,000,000 Senior Preferred Fixed to Floating Rate Notes, set to mature in October 2026. The outstanding amount of these notes totals 500 million euros.

data.title: Eastroc Beverage climbs to 44th in Kantar BrandZ Top 100 Chinese brands with a brand value of $4.218 bn, a 73% increase.
data.description: In a recent announcement on September 19, 2025, the 2025 Kantar BrandZ Top 100 Most Valuable Chinese Brands Report revealed that Eastroc Beverage secured the 44th position on the global ranking. The brand's value was reported to be $4.218 billion, marking a substantial advancement of 25 positions year-over-year.
